tools.name: Claude Code
tools.verify: Run claude from the project root and check /mcp if needed.

tools.name: Serena MCP
tools.verify: Install Serena, add MCP config, then confirm tools appear in Claude.

tools.name: Graphiti
tools.verify: Start Graphiti and run a memory write/read smoke test.

tools.name: Obsidian
tools.verify: Open the project folder or .ai-os/memory folder as a vault.

tools.name: Obsidian Local REST API
tools.verify: Install plugin, add OBSIDIAN_REST_API_KEY, call local API.
